'''鈭歞h-l-ng-p''' ('''kadhalngepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anarchize|anarchize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anarchize|anarchize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-l-ng-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhalngepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhalngepoko|thidhalngepoko]] || [[word:jidhalngepoko|jidhalngepoko]] || [[word:shidhalngepoko|shidhalngepoko]] || [[word:kidhalngepoko|kidhalngepoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
